_comment: Phase 7.2-h-extended: AXIS=Selection cross-check via translate. Both engines: select top face of cube, set actr.select, translate +1 unit along handle X (= largest bbox extent). If both engines compute the same selection-axis basis, the resulting vertex positions agree bit-for-bit. Top face has bbox extents (1,0,1) — tie X vs Z, stable sort picks X first → handle X = world X. Translate offX:1 should shift the 4 face verts +1 along world X.
